title: Deprecate legacy API server
description: Shut down legacy API server by end of week. Migrate all traffic to new Kubernetes cluster.

title: Configure API gateway for auth
description: All authentication requests must go through the new API gateway with rate limiting. No direct access.

title: Build centralized notification service
description: Centralized notification platform using Redis for deduplication. Replace all team-specific implementations.

title: Enforce 3-step onboarding maximum
description: Product mandate: onboarding must be maximum 3 steps. Enforce via API validation.
